changes.description: Baseline run with original verbose skill (434 lines, copied from skills/file-organization/SKILL.md). Both tasks scored 100/100.

Compressed skill from 434 lines to ~40 lines. Removed examples, pro tips, maintenance advice, clarifying-question instructions, and verbose formatting. Added explicit file-extension-to-directory mapping table and macOS-compatible md5 fallback. Both tasks scored 100/100 across 2 confirmation runs with reduced token cost.
